orders.adjustFilters: Change the search or filters to see other orders.
orders.businessSubtitle: Read and manage synchronized marketplace orders.
orders.enableChannelToSync: Enable the Channel before reading orders.
orders.loadFailed: Orders could not be loaded. Retry without changing any marketplace data.
orders.marketplaceOrdersWillAppearAfterW: Marketplace orders will appear after webhook processing or polling synchronization runs.
orders.name: Name
orders.retryReadOnlySync: Review the Channel connection, then retry the read-only synchronization.
orders.runReadOnlySync: Run a read-only synchronization to import marketplace orders.
orders.syncFailed: The read-only order synchronization failed. No marketplace data was changed.
orders.syncNeverRun: Order synchronization has not run yet
